---
name: gameplay-feature-delivery
description: "Deliver a gameplay feature end-to-end in this repo. Use for implementing a game improvement in index.html with validation and release-ready notes."
argument-hint: "Describe the feature, UX intent, and success criteria."
user-invocable: true
---
# Gameplay Feature Delivery

Use this skill when adding or refining gameplay features for games in this repo.

## Procedure
1. Clarify scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
2. Implement minimal focused changes in `index.html`.
3. Validate gameplay paths manually:
- Start/reset flow
- Primary interaction flow
- Help/hint flow (if present)
- Search/target flow (if present)
- Completion/win condition
4. Summarize behavior changes and any risks.
5. Provide a short release note draft.

## Definition Of Done
- [Feature DoD](./references/definition-of-done.md)
